allow: PowerShell($json = Get-Content "D:\\GME_AI\\Claude\\understandanything\\Script\\.understand-anything\\tmp\\ua-scan-files.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "totalFiles: $\($json.totalFiles\)"; Write-Host "filteredByIgnore: $\($json.filteredByIgnore\)"; Write-Host "estimatedComplexity: $\($json.estimatedComplexity\)"; Write-Host "byCategory:"; $json.stats.byCategory.PSObject.Properties | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $\($_.Name\): $\($_.Value\)" }; Write-Host "byLanguage:"; $json.stats.byLanguage.PSObject.Properties | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $\($_.Name\): $\($_.Value\)" })

PowerShell($scanData = Get-Content "D:\\GME_AI\\Claude\\understandanything\\Script\\.understand-anything\\tmp\\ua-scan-files.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $inputObj = [PSCustomObject]@{ projectRoot = "D:\\GME_AI\\Claude\\understandanything\\Script"; files = $scanData.files }; $jsonStr = $inputObj | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\("D:\\GME_AI\\Claude\\understandanything\\Script\\.understand-anything\\tmp\\ua-import-map-input.json", $jsonStr, [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new\($false\)\); Write-Host "Written without BOM")

PowerShell($importData = Get-Content "D:\\GME_AI\\Claude\\understandanything\\Script\\.understand-anything\\tmp\\ua-import-map-output.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "scriptCompleted: $\($importData.scriptCompleted\)"; Write-Host "stats.filesScanned: $\($importData.stats.filesScanned\)"; Write-Host "stats.filesWithImports: $\($importData.stats.filesWithImports\)"; Write-Host "stats.totalEdges: $\($importData.stats.totalEdges\)"; Write-Host "importMap keys count: $\($importData.importMap.PSObject.Properties.Count\)")
Bash(PYTHONPATH=. python -m pytest tests/test_wiki_lookup.py -o cache_dir=/tmp/ptc -p no:cacheprovider -q --tb=short -p no:logging)
